---
title: "George Montagu Harris"
---

## George Montagu Harris

**Dates:** (1868-1951)

### Description

cousin of CMY, son of the Rev. George Collyer Harris

### Biography

He had a distinguished career in local government;  WWW, obituary <i>The Times</i> (6 October 1951).

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 22d [1887?]
- Letter from March 27th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
